title: EllipticalArc2D Object
description: Transient 2D elliptical arc. A transient elliptical arc is not displayed or saved in a document. Transient 2D elliptical arcs are used as a wrapper to work with raw 2D elliptical arc information. They are created statically using the create method of the EllipticalArc2D class.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: copy
methods.description: Creates and returns a copy of this EllipticalArc2D object.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Gets all of the data defining the elliptical arc.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Sets all of the data defining the elliptical arc.

properties.name: asNurbsCurve
properties.description: Returns a NURBS curve that is geometrically identical to the elliptical arc.

properties.name: center
properties.description: Gets and sets the center position of the elliptical arc.

properties.name: curveType
properties.description: Returns the type of geometry this curve represents.

properties.name: endAngle
properties.description: Gets and sets the end angle of the elliptical arc in radians, where 0 is along the major axis.

properties.name: endPoint
properties.description: Gets the position of the end point of the elliptical arc.

properties.name: evaluator
properties.description: Returns an evaluator object that lets you perform additional evaluations on the curve.

properties.name: isCircular
properties.description: Gets if the elliptical arc is the geometric equivalent of a circular arc

properties.name: isClockwise
properties.description: Gets if the sweep direction of the elliptical arc is clockwise or counterclockwise.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: majorAxis
properties.description: Gets and sets the major axis of the elliptical arc.

properties.name: majorRadius
properties.description: Gets and sets the major radius of the elliptical arc.

properties.name: minorRadius
properties.description: Gets and sets the minor radius of the elliptical arc.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: startAngle
properties.description: Gets and sets the start angle of the elliptical arc in radians, where 0 is along the major axis.

properties.name: startPoint
properties.description: Gets the position of the start point of the elliptical arc.
